audio_description: The audio clip features a male voice with a low pitch and a slow speaking rate. The voice sounds slightly strained and emotional, with a slight tremble in the delivery. There are no other non-speech sounds present in the clip.
temporal_description: A young man with dark hair and round glasses, wearing a dark jacket over a blue shirt, is seen in a dimly lit, dusty, and debris-filled stone corridor. He is initially crouched, looking forward with his mouth slightly open, as dust and fragments of debris fall around him. Later, he stands still with his back to the camera, facing a large, plain stone wall, holding a wand in his right hand, and remains motionless as the scene fades into darkness.
